pageHeader.title: ERP Sync Hub
pageHeader.subtitle: Automated ERP data pipelines into TyrePulse.

banner.heading: No ERP connector is configured
banner.bodyPre: There is no live ERP connection for this workspace, so there is no sync status or history to show. Until a connector is provisioned, use the
banner.bodySuffix: to import ERP exports (Excel/CSV) through the same validated staging pipeline.

targets.footerNote: These are systems the connector is designed to integrate with. None is connected yet.

1.title: Provision a connector
1.body: An administrator configures ERP endpoint, credentials (stored server-side) and the sync schedule. Requires API access - not available in read-only mode.

2.title: Map fields once
2.body: Reuse a saved mapping profile from the Data Intake Center so ERP fields land in the correct TyrePulse columns with validation and currency normalisation.

3.title: Scheduled read-only sync
3.body: The connector pulls on a schedule, stages every row for review, and commits only validated records - the same controlled pipeline as manual imports.

importCard.title: Import ERP exports
importCard.description: Upload Excel/CSV from any ERP, map, validate and commit.

historyCard.title: Review import history
historyCard.description: Every batch, mapping profile and validation outcome is auditable.
